suspicious_activity.narrative: Tracy Lewis, DOB 1966-10-26, residing at 8016 Nicole Stream Suite 650, Williamsside, ID, engaged in suspicious structuring activity. Between 2025-07-25 and 2025-07-31, Lewis made seven cash deposits totaling $67,569.06, each just below $10,000, across multiple branches including University District and Southpark Ave. These transactions are inconsistent with her profile as a nurse with an annual income of $131,925. The pattern suggests an attempt to evade CTR reporting requirements. Account IDs involved include CUST_0053_ACC_1 and CUST_0053_ACC_2. This activity triggers mandatory SAR filing under 31 CFR 1020.320 and 12 CFR 21.11.
suspicious_activity.ai_reasoning: STEP 1: Reviewed customer profile, account details, and transactions. Noted high volume of cash deposits just below $10,000. STEP 2: Identified potential structuring pattern with 7 cash deposits between $9,000-$9,999. STEP 3: Mapped to BSA SAR filing requirements. STEP 4: High confidence due to clear structuring indicators. STEP 5: Classified as Structuring.
